zh.lifeSummary: 當Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden於大約1106年出生時，他的父親Niels of Denmark44歲，母親Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden26歲。他於大約1127年與Richenza von Polen在丹麥里伯里伯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1134年6月4日在瑞典斯奧福迪維可享年29歲，埋葬在瑞典額斯特格特藍德福利塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden于大约1106年出生时，他的父亲Niels of Denmark44岁，母亲Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden26岁。他于大约1127年与Richenza von Polen在丹麦里伯里伯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1134年6月4日在瑞典斯奧福迪維可享年29岁，埋葬在瑞典額斯特格特藍德福利塔。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Sweden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van Sweeden): variant of Van Zweeden, a habitational name for someone from Sweden.
Probably also an altered form of Norwegian   Sween   or possibly Irish   Sweeten  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sween
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McSween  .

nameMeanings.name: Magnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Latin byname meaning ‘great’, this was first extracted from the name of Charlemagne (recorded in Latin chronicles as Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’) and used as a given name by the Scandinavians. It was borne by seven medieval kings of Norway, including Magnus I ( 1024–47 ), known as Magnus the Good, and Magnus VI ( 1238–80 ), known as Magnus the Law Mender. There are several early Scandinavian saints called Magnus, including an earl of Orkney ( d. 1116 ), to whom Kirkwall cathedral is dedicated. The name was imported to Scotland and Ireland during the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: den
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄧, see   Deng  .
Chinese: possibly from the Romanization of certain Chinese personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

Origin undetermined. — Note: It is possible that in the population figure published by the US Census Bureau the Dutch case-inflected definite article de ‘the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Den Bleyker and Den Boer , is in some instances counted as an independent surname. Compare Ten .

nameMeanings.name: Stærke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch: nickname for a strong, bold person, from Middle High German stark(e), Middle Dutch starck(e), staerk(e) ‘strong, brave’.

variants.name: Stark
meanings: Modern name, a vernacular equivalent of   Stella .

en.lifeSummary: When Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden was born about 1106, his father, Niels of Denmark, was 44 and his mother, Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden, was 26. He married Richenza von Polen about 1127, in Ribe, Ribe, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 June 1134, in Fotevik, Skåne, Sweden, at the age of 29, and was buried in Vreta, Östergötland, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden est né environ 1106, son père, Niels of Denmark, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Richenza von Polen environ 1127, à Ribe, Ribe, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1134, à Fotevik, Skåne, Suède, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Vreta, Östergötland, Suède.

Er hat um 1127 in Ribe, Ribe, Dänemark Richenza von Polen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Juni 1134 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Fotevik, Skåne, Schweden und wurde in Vreta, Östergötland, Schweden begraben.

Lui sposato Richenza von Polen circa 1127, nel Ribe, Ribe, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 giugno 1134, nel Fotevik, Skåne, Svezia, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Vreta, Östergötland, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Magnus I den Stærke of Swedenが約1106年に生まれた時，父Niels of Denmarkは44歳，母Margaret Fredkulla of Swedenは26歳であった。約1127年にデンマークリベリベでRichenza von Polenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1134年6月4日にスウェーデンスクaンフォテヴィクで29歳で死去し，スウェーデンoステルグoトランドvレタにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden(이)가 대략 1106년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Niels of Denmark(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1127년 덴마크 리브 리브에서 Richenza von Polen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1134년 6월 4일 스웨덴 스ka니 포테빅에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 스웨덴 o스터그o틀랜드 브레타에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden nasceu aproximadamente 1106, seu pai, Niels of Denmark, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Richenza von Polen aproximadamente 1127, em Ribe, Ribe, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1134, em Fotevik, Skåne, Suécia, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Vreta, Östergötland, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden родился около 1106 г., его отцу по имени Niels of Denmark было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Richenza von Polen около 1127 г. в местности риб, риб, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 июня 1134 г. в местности фотевик, скaн, Швеция в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности врета, oстиргoтланд, Швеция.
